[cron:g:896abba2-7543-45a2-885c-dfd33b0e409d OpenClaw Daily Backup] Run the daily OpenClaw backup. Execute: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "C:\Users\yyzypublic\.openclaw\workspace\OpenClaw\daily_backup.ps1". Check the output for success/failure. If it reports a commit hash, the backup was successful. If no changes, that's fine too. No need to notify the user unless there's an error.
Current time: Saturday, June 13th, 2026 - 02:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-06-12 18:00 UTC

Return your response as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
